fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the table to which this comment applies.
The program automatically fills in this field with the name of the table for which the comment was created.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: When you register various comments, the program automatically enters a line number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the different comments you have set up in the various tables.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comment.
